Class MapFacadeBean

java.lang.Object
org.openxava.model.impl.MapFacadeBean
public class MapFacadeBean extends Object
Implement the logic of MapFacade.

The Bean suffix is because until 6.x it was a SessionBean.

Author:
Javier Paniza
